Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Armoury Cleaner
Description: Define filters by job, minimum/maximum level, and item level. Armoury Cleaner will scan each gear slot and safely discard only items that match all active filters.
Punchline: Filter and discard unwanted gear from your armoury chest.
Changelog:
v1.0.3: Auto-Discard mode — items can now be permanently deleted in one click via InventoryManager.DiscardItem (opt-in, off by default, confirmation required).
v1.0.2: Rarity colour filters (skip White/Green/Blue/Purple/Pink); item names now coloured by rarity in results table.
v1.0.1: Wider level/iLvl input boxes, working None button, collapsible instructions panel.
v1.0.0: Initial release.
